strategy: Set up and hit before round 4 — at the start of every 4th round she steals all your positive charms and wards.
Don't Feint her (she Cleanses it off) and don't put single traps on her (she reads a trap as a cue to buff her whole team with +30% damage, +20% accuracy, +10% pierce, +30% healing).
Buff with Auras and blades instead, and attack with Myth, Life, or Death (she takes +15% from all three; she resists Fire, Ice, and Storm 40%).
Deal with the Clockworker she summons or just burst her 4,300 health directly.
Enter on time — late wizards get Mana Burned.
cheatNotes: Late wizards get Mana Burned (pips drained) — enter on time with pips intact.
She summons a Clockworker at the start (more if 3+ wizards) — kill it or ignore it and race her down.
At the start of every 4th round she steals ALL your positive charms and wards — land your blades-and-hit before round 4, or rebuild fast right after.
Feint on her gets Cleansed off (and triggers her ally-buff cheat) — don't Feint her.
Placing a Trap on her makes her hand her whole team +30% damage, +20% accuracy, +10% pierce, and +30% healing — avoid single traps here.
